main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'CAG exhaustion por cloramina + breakthrough + oxidative degradation' literal.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (fouling coloidal/particulado, envejecimiento prematuro, fallo CAG-1, bypass CAG).

recommended_action.justification: Replace second CAG + SBS 2.0-2.5 mg/L + monitor — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide breakthrough curve o iodine number CAG — match accepted (saturación CAG).

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: CAG retiene >80% iodine y >50% cloramina capacity → switch.
